render_evidence.basis: hand-stamp: live render + structural parity + human review
render_evidence.pixel_oracle: none (anchor-only comparison is circular; not credited)

description: Horizontal bars per category (rows) whose length is a measure, segmented by a second dimension (color); sorted by the measure.
avoid_when: The ask wants a single market-share value — one measure divided by another to get a 'market share' number or ratio — which is a single KPI, not a segmented composition to break across categories in a stacked bar.

slots.notes: template column has aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]'; cosmetic secondary-role hint carried onto the target (verification-report correction: GREEN -> YELLOW).

hazards.detail: shelf-sort-v2 sorts [none:Region:nk] by measure [sum:Sales:qk]; both slots must bind or the sort dangles (both required, satisfied by coverage).

[Region] aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]' is not rewritten; target inherits the secondary-role hint. Verification report corrects this template from GREEN to YELLOW. Safe under binding, so fast_path_eligible stays true.
